name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless Bluetooth
quirks: Prefer the headset's dedicated USB/base-station path for game chat when available; Bluetooth mic use is compatibility fallback only.
SBC-XQ is kept as the preferred Bluetooth playback path when available, with a safer profile latency floor that avoids HFP/HSP fallback and stays within PipeWire's default link buffer budget.
source_notes: Linux user reports for Bluetooth gaming headsets commonly describe the A2DP playback versus HFP microphone tradeoff.
